title: The Greek polis
description: Test your knowledge of the history of Greek city-states!

assessment_items.question_content:
The _polis_ is another word for

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Helots are a class of unfree laborers.

assessment_items.question_content:
Which of the following characteristics were most valued in Spartan society?

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Military might was highly valued in Sparta.

assessment_items.question_content:
How did the wealth gained through maritime trade affect Athenians?

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Wealth gained through maritime trade did not make wealth available to the majority of the population.

choices.content: it made sailors disproportionately wealthy when compared to the rest of the population
it made a greater proportion of wealth available to the majority of the population
it concentrated wealth in the hands of a few elites and forced others to go into debt slavery
